name: ViewConventionHistory
description: View the history of conventions derived from a selected point of rest.
preconditions: The Agency is in the form of a designated point of rest.
postconditions: The system displays the history of conventions concerning the point of eating selected.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

UC11: Access the features on the display of historical conventions.
Upload data on conventions from the restaurant selected.
